# GlassKit Web

> Production-ready Astro template in the GlassKit design language (glassmorphism):
> one codebase for B2C and B2B audiences, bilingual (DE/EN), SEO, no-JS fallbacks
> and a Playwright smoke suite included. Built by Jungherz GmbH, MIT-licensed.

## Primary reference

- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/JUNGHERZ/GlassKit-Web/blob/main/SKILL.md): machine-readable reference — section catalog, rules, recipes for deriving a new site, converting an existing one, and pulling template updates. Start here.
- [README](https://github.com/JUNGHERZ/GlassKit-Web/blob/main/README.md): human-readable overview and quick start.
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/JUNGHERZ/GlassKit-Web/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): versioned releases — the update guide for derived projects.

## Pages

- [Landing page (EN)](https://glasskit-web.jungherz.com/): product overview
- [Documentation (EN)](https://glasskit-web.jungherz.com/docs.html): curated docs with deep links into the repo
- [Live demo](https://glasskit-web.jungherz.com/demo/): the LUMEN demo site built from the template (German; English under /demo/en/), serves its own llms.txt at /demo/llms.txt

## Family

- [GlassKit](https://glasskit.jungherz.com/): the CSS foundation — 24 glassmorphism components, design tokens
- [GlassKit Elements](https://glasskit-elements.jungherz.com/): 29 web components for application UIs

## Optional

- [German landing page](https://glasskit-web.jungherz.com/de/)
- [German documentation](https://glasskit-web.jungherz.com/de/docs.html)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/JUNGHERZ/GlassKit-Web)
